title: Arch Svoboda 1997 123
description: The timeline of historic inventions is a chronological list of particularly significant technological inventions and their inventors, where known. This page lists non-incremental inventions that are widely recognized by reliable sources as having had a direct impact on the course of history that was profound, global, and enduring.
shortDescription: The timeline of historic inventions is a chronological list of particularly significant technological inventions and their inventors, where known.
